task_completion.description: Verify that SEC-LPT-01, SEC-LPT-02, and SEC-LPT-03 have been audited with the correct note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Snipe-IT asset history, audit logs, or success notifications showing an audit action for SEC-LPT-01, SEC-LPT-02, and SEC-LPT-03 with the exact note 'Audited successfully in SCIF Alpha'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the next audit date for SEC-LPT-01, SEC-LPT-02, SEC-LPT-03, and SEC-LPT-04 is set to 2026-06-08.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Asset details pages or the main asset list view showing the 'Next Audit Date' column populated with '2026-06-08' for these four assets.

task_completion.description: Verify that SEC-LPT-04 has been audited with the correct note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Snipe-IT asset history or audit log showing an audit action for SEC-LPT-04 with the exact note 'Found in SCIF Bravo, location updated during audit'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the location of SEC-LPT-04 has been updated to 'SCIF Bravo'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Asset details page or asset list view showing the Location field as 'SCIF Bravo' for SEC-LPT-04.

task_completion.description: Verify that SEC-LPT-05 has its status updated to 'Lost/Stolen' with the correct note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Asset details page or history for SEC-LPT-05 showing the Status changed to 'Lost/Stolen' and the note 'Reported missing during Q1 physical audit'.

task_completion.description: Verify that no other assets in the system were modified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The recent activity log or asset list does not show recent modifications, audits, or status changes to any assets other than SEC-LPT-01 through SEC-LPT-05.

integrity.description: The agent used the Snipe-IT web interface to perform the audits and updates.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Snipe-IT web application in a browser, rather than terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: The agent navigated through the asset management system menus and forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of Snipe-IT UI elements like navigation sidebars, asset lists, audit forms, and success toast notifications.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a database client or terminal to execute SQL queries to update the records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows, MySQL/PostgreSQL prompts, or database management tools like phpMyAdmin in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target assets are SEC-LPT-01, SEC-LPT-02, SEC-LPT-03, SEC-LPT-04, and SEC-LPT-05. The expected next audit date for assets 01 through 04 is exactly '2026-06-08'. SEC-LPT-01, 02, and 03 require the note 'Audited successfully in SCIF Alpha'. SEC-LPT-04 requires the location 'SCIF Bravo' and the note 'Found in SCIF Bravo, location updated during audit'. SEC-LPT-05 requires the status 'Lost/Stolen' and the note 'Reported missing during Q1 physical audit'.
